news.title: Dell stock skyrockets 32% for its best day ever as AI server revenue soars
news.detail: Dell reported its fastest pace of revenue growth since returning to the public market in 2018, with AI server revenue soaring 757% over last year.

news.title: Stocks close at record highs with tech leading the way again. Nasdaq gains 8% in May
news.detail: U.S. equities closed at record highs on Friday, while crude prices slipped, helping the major averages score a winning month, boosted by technology.

news.title: 戴尔股价暴涨32%创历史最佳单日表现，AI服务器营收飙升
news.detail: 戴尔科技股价周五收盘暴涨32.76%，创下历史最佳单日表现。此前公司公布了自2018年重返公开市场以来任一时期的最快营收增速。

news.title: 德意志银行上调10年期美国国债收益率预期 相信美联储已经完成降息
news.detail: 德意志银行利率策略师上调了今年年底的10年期美国国债收益率预期，理由是预计如今由主席凯文·沃什领导的美联储官员已经结束降息。

news.title: SpaceX skeptics have added reason for concern after Musk comments diverge from IPO filing
news.detail: In a post on X, Elon Musk offered details about SpaceX's deal with Anthropic that weren't included in the company's IPO prospectus.

news.title: Citadel Securities Reels In Record $4.3 Billion Trading Haul - Bloomberg.com
news.detail: 国际财经动态，关注后续发展。

news.title: 纽约时报：天价IPO定价对散户并非好事
news.detail: 当SpaceX、OpenAI等明星公司以惊人估值冲刺上市时，普通投资者正面临一个尴尬的现实：天价IPO定价让机构和大股东赚得盆满钵满，却让散户处在“接盘”的不利位置。
